summary: Well‑recorded audience tape of a decent 1994 show with standout performances of Deal, Birdsong and He's Gone > Truckin'.
review: The recording is an off‑the‑stage audience capture that sounds surprisingly clear for its source. While the reviewer isn’t a huge fan of the 1994 era, they note the set is solid and highlight Deal, Birdsong and the He’s Gone > Truckin' segue as the high points.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review; shows a decent performance (≈3/5) and an unusually good audience recording (≈4/5), yielding a weighted average around 3.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it "very well recorded for an OTS aud" – clear and listenable despite being an audience source, with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A solid but unremarkable early‑90s set; the highlighted tracks provide the main excitement.
